title: French Bean and Sprouts Bowl
description: A simple and nutritious bowl filled with sautéed mung bean and sprouts, served with a side of piquant sauce.

ingredients.name: piquant sauce ingredients (soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, ginger)
velvety sauce ingredients (soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add mung bean and sprouts, and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together piquant sauce ingredients.
Add piquant sauce to the mung bean mixture and stir-fry for another minute.
To make velvety sauce, mix together soy sauce, honey, and rice vinegar.
Serve mung bean and sprouts mixture in a bowl, drizzle with velvety sauce, and serve with a side of crusty French bread.
Optional: top with additional piquant sauce for extra flavor.
